# Tandoori Corner

> Tandoori Corner is a North Indian restaurant and TCB Bar inside Balestier Plaza, Singapore. We have been serving alfresco dining, tandoori grills, evening cocktails, home delivery, and catering for 15 years.

## Location & Contact

- Address: 400 Balestier Road #01-12 Balestier Plaza, Singapore 329802
- Phone: +65 9862 7334
- Email: tandooricorner@singnet.com.sg
- Website: https://www.tandooricorner.sg
- Map: https://maps.app.goo.gl/jE9ppAZ8BDcoJHZY9

## Hours

- Lunch: 12:00 - 14:45 daily
- Dinner & TCB Bar: 18:00 - 21:45 daily

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.tandooricorner.sg/): Overview, hero, daily offers, signature dishes, Google reviews.
- [Menu](https://www.tandooricorner.sg/menu): Full North Indian menu — chef signatures, tandoori grills, curries, biryanis, breads, desserts, TCB Bar drinks.
- [Experience](https://www.tandooricorner.sg/experience): Reservations, takeaway, private events, TCB Bar bookings, pet-friendly alfresco dining.
- [Our Story](https://www.tandooricorner.sg/story): History, team, gallery, press features.

## What We're Known For

- 24-hour-marinated tandoori meats and seafood
- Silken North Indian curries (OG Butter Chicken, Saag Mutton)
- The TCB Bar — Tandoori Corner's evening cocktail and beer-fest bar
- Pet-friendly alfresco balcony at Balestier Plaza
- Lunch thali sets, catering, and home delivery across Singapore
